input.prompt: The scene focuses on the Ellie Lamps product already lit, showing the texture, finish, and the light falling on the books and wall. Use the exact product from the product reference image, preserving its shape, proportions, material, color, and details. The same character from the character reference image is visible from the face and upper body while interacting with the scene, preserving identity, face, clothing, hairstyle, and body proportions.
